options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: shuffle_main_party
options.description: Shuffle the 6 main party members around.

options.name: difficulty_progressive_scaling
options.description:
In addition to the progression scaling, also scale the progression based on the number of party members, 
the second license board has been unlocked, and progressive access to slightly easier regions to unlock more difficult areas.

options.name: include_treasures
options.description: Allows treasures to contain progression and useful items.

options.name: include_chops
options.description:
Allows pinewood chops and sandalwood chop checks to contain progression and useful items.
Note: The Bahamut Unlock Goal for collecting pinewood chops will still
require the player to collect the 28 chops for the Writ of Transit.

options.name: include_black_orbs
options.description: Allows Pharos floor 1 and Subterra black orb checks to contain progression and useful items.

options.name: include_trophy_rare_games
options.description:
Allows trophy rare game checks to contain progression and useful items.
Includes: Rare Game drops and Number of Rare Game Killed checks.

options.name: include_hunt_rewards
options.description: Allows Hunt rewards and drops to contain progression and useful items.

options.name: include_clan_hall_rewards
options.description: Allows Clan Hall rewards to contain progression and useful items.

options.name: allow_seitengrat
options.description: Allow Seitengrat to appear in the item pool and bazaars.

options.name: bahamut_unlock
options.description:
Determines where the Writ of Transit is placed to unlock travel to the Bahamut to beat the game.
Defeat Cid 2: Climb the Pharos and defeat Cid 2 (Requires 2 magicites and 1 story sword).
Collect Pinewood Chops: Collect 28 pinewood chops from the multiworld and turn in for the Sandalwood Chop check.
Collect Espers: Collect all 13 espers and turn in for the Clan Hall Control 13 Espers check.
Defeat Shadowseer: Defeat the Shadowseer in the Pharos and turn in for the Hunt 44: Shadowseer check.
Defeat Yiazmat: Defeat Yiazmat in Ridorana and turn in for the Hunt 45: Yiazmat check.
Defeat Omega: Defeat Omega Mark XII in the Great Crystal and turn in for the Clan Boss: Omega Mark XII check.
Random Location: The Writ of Transit can be anywhere in the multiworld.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
